DESCRIPTION: IoT Reference Architecture: Best practices: Edge software (HighByte, DXC) for data merging at edge, MQTT pub/sub for device communication, Snowpipe Streaming with chronological insert for time-series optimization, Native JSON/VARIANT for device data, Dynamic Tables for automated aggregation (minute/hour/day), Snowpark for external libraries, bidirectional Rules Engine for device control feedback loop.
